stemHtml: A passenger falls ill during a routine flight and you decide to divert. How do you inform ATC and get priority?

options.a: Transmit PAN PAN MEDICAL ("PAN PAN MAY-DE-CALL").
options.b: Set transponder to 7700 and send a distress message.
options.c: Declare urgency and inform ATC of the reason.
options.d: Request an amended clearance without any prefix.
